description_long: This is a light green athletic sneaker with a mesh upper, featuring a white, thick, and textured sole. The shoe has a standard lace-up closure with matching light green laces and a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. A stylized logo is visible on the side and tongue, both in a slightly darker green shade. The mesh material covers most of the upper, providing breathability, while the sole appears to be made of durable rubber or foam. The interior is padded for comfort, and the overall design is streamlined and sporty. The shoe is clean and shows no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A light green mesh athletic sneaker with a white, thick sole, lace-up closure, and visible side logo. The shoe is clean, padded, and designed for comfort and breathability.
description_view_0: Top view showing the mesh upper, laces, tongue logo, and padded collar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stylized side logo, mesh texture, and thick white sole.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the sole, which is mostly white with a green section and a simple tread pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the heel pull tab, mesh upper, and sole profile.
attribute_logo: Stylized 'H' logo on the side and tongue, both in dark green.
